feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Technology Platform
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Technology Platform Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I'd like to configure the SAP Destination service to use a certificate issued by private CA.
entry.content:
Hello,

How can I configure the BTP to trust private CA so that I can use a certificate it has issued within the SAP Destination service?
I've already confirmed that certificates issued by public CA like Amazon can be used.
The Destination setting is as shown in the attached screenshot.

I look forward to hearing from you.

entry.title: Extracting Line Items from the a Document Template
entry.content:
Happy Monday Experts. I am working on an automation that will auto-approve invoices using a document template. I have create a 'skeleton' so to say. My current setup extracts fields at a Header field. But I need assistance with extracting field at a line item level. Basically I need a clarity on the approach, because various invoices have varying numbers of line items.

Therefore, I would to know if I show create line for the empty fields, that way it would return details should that space been populate and return blank if the fields are empty.

SAP Business Technology Platform #SAP Build Process Automation SAP Intelligent Robotic Process Automation

entry.title: List Creation, Population and Retrieval
entry.content:
Dear Maestros, I have created a List variable, but I am only able to Set Variable Value for the 0th element and only retrieve the 0th element, because my 'Set Variable Value' method only allows input of myVariable[0]. I would like to ask what I may be doing incorrect? 

SAP Business Technology Platform SAP Build Apps SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Cloud identity service user created failed login to an application
entry.content:
After following the guide (https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/create-openid-connect-application) and having established a trust connection to one of my applications in cloud identity service  , creating a new user and assigning it to a group of type (usergroup and creating the respective rule in Conditional Authentication) for my application, when I try to login via default identity provider I get "
Sorry, we could not authenticate you. Try again."

Please note that with an admin account created I cannot  log in.

I also tried without creating the group but nothing changes.

How can I resolve this issue?

thanks,

Davide

entry.title: Unable to open integration suite using trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am getting the error while trying to open Integration suite using my trial account. Attached the error screenshot.

Kindly help to resolve the issue.

 

Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: Migrating from SAP BTP CF subaccount to other CF subaccount
entry.content:
Hi,

We are planning to migrate our existing SAP BTP CF subaccount to other new CF subaccount. Please guide us, what are the steps / standard processes need to be followed during this process.

Note - Both the CF subaccounts (new & old) are under the same Global account.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: CPI - if function returns multiple values
entry.content:
the if function is returning always the true value and the false value together in the same context, which makes my target structure take the false value (as being the first value).

I could manage the issue with the following udf-script and mapping:

def void conditionalMappingSingle(String[] conditions, String[] trueValues, String[] falseValues, Output output, MappingContext context) {
    // Loop through the conditions and find the first true value
    for (int i = 0; i < conditions.length; i++) {
        if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase(conditions[i])) {
            output.addValue(trueValues[i]); // Add the corresponding true value to the output
            return; // Exit after finding the first true value
        }
    }
    // If no true value is found, add the first false value to the output
    if (falseValues.length > 0) {
        output.addValue(falseValues[0]); // Default to the first false value
    }
}

Using if (standard function)

 

 

using user-defined function:

 

Isn't there a way to solve it with the standard mapping functions?

entry.title: Sending files from different folders/directories at a time through single SFTP sender channel.
entry.content:
Hello SAPians,

I have a requirement where there will be 3 different folders in  AL11. I have to fetch files from these 3 folders at a time and send it to the receiver using SFTP sender channel. I have to send all this files at a time using single sender channel. If not SFTP, pls suggest the correct way.

Thanks in advance 🙂
SAP Cloud Platform, industry edition, client libraries SAP BTP, ABAP environment SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Issues with creating Signup page
entry.content: Hello everyone, I am trying to create a Signup page for my app, I followed closely some videos I saw on youtube as well as do some reading around, just to fix it but I dont seem to see where the problem is. I have been stuck and I believe assistance from anyone at this point might help. Thank you

entry.title: Cloud Management Tools - Major Upgrade - Announcement - 22 February 2025
entry.content:
I received a notification email with the subject line ‘Cloud Management Tools - Major Upgrade - Announcement - 22 February 2025’.
I looked under ‘What's New for SAP Business Technology Platform’ to check the Upgrade content, but did not find any information that looked like that.
I would like to know the specific details of the Upgrade, as I need to explain it to my customer. Alternatively, I would like to know the URL of the page with the specific Upgrade content.

entry.title: CDS $metadata 8.6.0 locally vs btp based deployment
entry.content:
We have a CAP 8.6.0 JS implementation. Locally the $metadata look different compared to the BTP based deployment. We have an entity which is annotated : 

annotate CustomerProfile @odata.draft.enabled;

Locally the Fiori Elements based App has no ''Create" button while remotly deployed it works correctly.

When we compare the metadata then locally it is different compared to the BTP deployment. 

Is there a way to see or debug how the $metadata gets composed , meaning which settings/annotations from which folder/file and sequence are being used ?

Best, Mike

entry.title: Exposing JWKS from SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi experts

One of the integration scenario where we have synchronous communication between S4->Integration suite-> Third Party application(target system).
As part of the synch flow we need to send sensitive infor like DOB,SSN and hence the need to send this data in encrypted format.
The target system s using a JWKS(JSON Web Key set) method to secure the data and hence requesting the same to be used in Integration suite. JWKS keys will be exposed on an URL endpoint by target system to be used by SAP IS.
Can someone share information/links on JWKS encryption method in Integration suite where we know how to share JWKS keys, can anyone help us with details on how JWKS keys are to be created and exposed from Integration suite over an endpoint controlled in Integration suite.

Thanks

entry.title: Update directory structure in subaccount
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I'm trying to change subaccount display name and directory structure like change the parent of a directory and move subaccount from one directory to another. If I change these features, will it cause changes (update/delete) my existing services or developments that are already created in my subaccount. Please advise.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with Losing References and Element Positions in Screen Recordings After SAP Build Automation
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Automation, and after the latest update, I noticed that all the screen recordings have lost their references and element positions (clicks). This has significantly impacted the automation flows, as the interactions are no longer working as expected.

Could you please confirm if it is common for this to happen after an update? Is there a solution or any best practices to prevent this loss of data in future updates? I would appreciate any guidance on how to resolve or mitigate this issue with screen recordings.

Looking forward to your response.

entry.title: Issue with Losing References and Element Positions in Screen Recordings After SAP Build Automation
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Automation, and after the latest update, I noticed that all the screen recordings have lost their references and element positions (clicks). This has significantly impacted the automation flows, as the interactions are no longer working as expected.

Could you please confirm if it is common for this to happen after an update? Is there a solution or any best practices to prevent this loss of data in future updates? I would appreciate any guidance on how to resolve or mitigate this issue with screen recordings.

Looking forward to your response.

entry.title: Request for Solution to Transport Automation Projects from Test to Production transport
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Automation and would like to know if there is a way to transport automation projects from the Test environment to Production without the need to re-record the screens. The manual re-recording of interactions has become a time-consuming process, and I would like to know if there is any method or feature that allows screen recordings to remain intact when moving projects between environments.

Thank you for your help, and I look forward to receiving instructions on how to proceed.

entry.title: Request for Solution to Transport Automation Projects from Test to Production Without Re-recording S
entry.content:
I am using SAP Build Automation and would like to know if there is a way to transport automation projects from the Test environment to Production without the need to re-record the screens. The manual re-recording of interactions has become a time-consuming process, and I would like to know if there is any method or feature that allows screen recordings to remain intact when moving projects between environments.

Thank you for your help, and I look forward to receiving instructions on how to proceed.

entry.title: spring 6.0.2 security upgrade requestMatchers method with any http method giving 403
entry.content:
Hi Team,
I am working on migrating my application from spring 5 to spring (6.0.2) .
After doing changes to pom(moving most of the jars from javax to Jakarta), I am able to deploy my application in cf with sap_java_buildpack_jakarta.
 
Below is the SecurityConfiguration class (a portion of it shared here).
This is giving 403 always. I have validated the jwt token and authorities and scopes from jwt decoder. all are as expected. even then if I use requestMatchers method with any http method it is always giving 403.
only permitAll() is allowing to pass the call.
 
can someone help me to understand why this is working fine with spring 5 and why it is giving 403 in spring 6.0.2?
and any solution to fix this?
 
 
--------------SecurityConfiguration-----
@configuration
@EnableWebSecurity
@profile(Profiles.CLOUD)
public class SecurityConfiguration {
 
    private final Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(SecurityConfiguration.class);
    @Autowired
    XsuaaServiceConfiguration xsuaaServiceConfiguration;
 @Bean
    public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(final HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {
        final String brokerPlanXSAppName = xsuaaServiceConfiguration.getAppId();
        http.sessionManagement(management -> management
                // session is created by app router
                .sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.NEVER))
                // CSRF handling is done by app router (if one is used)
                .csrf(CsrfConfigurer::disable)
                // demand specific scopes depending on intended request
                .authorizeHttpRequests(auth -> auth.requestMatchers(HttpMethod.GET, "/rest/computation/keyMetrics")
  .hasAnyAuthority("VIEW_DATA_ACQ_ERRORLOG") 
                        // deny any other end points
                        .anyRequest().denyAll())
                .oauth2ResourceServer(server -> server.jwt().jwtAuthenticationConverter(getJwtAuthoritiesConverter()));
       return http.build();
    }
private Converter<Jwt, AbstractAuthenticationToken> getJwtAuthoritiesConverter() {
        final TokenAuthenticationConverter converter = new TokenAuthenticationConverter(xsuaaServiceConfiguration);
        converter.setLocalScopeAsAuthorities(false);
        return converter;
    }
 
    @Bean
    @Scope(value = WebApplicationContext.SCOPE_REQUEST, proxyMode = ScopedProxyMode.TARGET_CLASS)
    public Token userInfo() {
        return SpringSecurityContext.getToken();
    }
 
    @Bean
    public IUserInfoProvider userInfoProvider() {
        return new UserInfoProvider();
    }
 
    @Bean
    public XsuaaCredentials xsuaaCredentials() {
        final VcapServiceReader vcapServicesReader = VcapServiceReader.getInstance();
        final String uaaUrl = (String) vcapServicesReader.getAttribute(EnvironmentConstants.XSUAA_BROKER_SERVICE_NAME,
                EnvironmentConstants.ENV_URL);
        final String clientId = (String) vcapServicesReader.getAttribute(EnvironmentConstants.XSUAA_BROKER_SERVICE_NAME,
                EnvironmentConstants.CLIENTID);
        final String clientSecret = (String) vcapServicesReader.getAttribute(EnvironmentConstants.XSUAA_BROKER_SERVICE_NAME,
                EnvironmentConstants.CLIENTSECRET);
        final String uaaDomain = (String) vcapServicesReader.getAttribute(EnvironmentConstants.XSUAA_BROKER_SERVICE_NAME,
                EnvironmentConstants.UAA_DOMAIN);
        final String xsAppName = (String) vcapServicesReader.getAttribute(EnvironmentConstants.XSUAA_BROKER_SERVICE_NAME,
                EnvironmentConstants.XSAPPNAME);
        final XsuaaCredentials credentials = new XsuaaCredentials();
        credentials.setClientId(clientId);
        credentials.setClientSecret(clientSecret);
        credentials.setUrl(uaaUrl);
        credentials.setUaaDomain(uaaDomain);
        credentials.setXsAppName(xsAppName);
        return credentials;
    }
 
    @Bean
    public XsuaaServiceConfiguration customXsuaaConfig(final XsuaaCredentials xsuaaCredentials) {
        return new XsuaaServiceConfigurationCustom(xsuaaCredentials);
    }
 
    @Bean
    JwtDecoder jwtDecoder(final XsuaaServiceConfiguration customXsuaaServiceConfiguration, final XsuaaCredentials xsuaaCredentials) {
        return new XsuaaJwtDecoderBuilder(customXsuaaServiceConfiguration).build();
    }
}

entry.title: How to auto generate ID column on CAP Entity Projects?
entry.content:
As part of our project requirement we want to use generated number with prefix of 'S' and few leading zeros '0000' and number in the end like 1 etc. The expected generated value is like below where there is any insert in to:

entity BPM : cuid, managed {
     publish_status     : String(500);
     retry_count : Integer default 0;
     internalId: String(10); // generated string
}
 
generated string should be like
S000000001
S000000002
S000000003
S000000004
S000000005
....
S000000015 etc.
 
 
If this is not possible at least generated integer and auto increment on insert like below:
entity BPM : cuid, managed {
     publish_status     : String(500);
     retry_count : Integer default 0;
     internalId: Integer auto generated increment by 1 // generated number...
}
 
We have already UUID generated value, but still we are looking the internal ID in readable format like 10 character string. I got some example with sequence, but we want to avoid call to sequence and set the text before insert. please help if any one is aware of that.

entry.title: Deploy CAP project to HANA in local with help of docker?
entry.content: Can we deploy CAP project to HANA in local with help of docker?
